      "question": "The Basel Convention, an international treaty, aims to regulate the global trade of hazardous waste, including electronic waste. What is the primary focus of this convention?",
      "options": ["A) Reduction of e-waste generation", "B) Recycling of e-waste", "C) Restriction of hazardous waste trade", "D) Increase in e-waste exports"],
      "correct": 2,
